overall.description: A cinematic static view of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of the Great Hall from Harry Potter, rendered in a game engine. The scene features floating candle chandeliers illuminating long dining tables filled with NPCs, massive stained glass windows showing a night sky, and warm firelight from a large stone fireplace, creating a magical medieval atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera observing the dining hall and its occupants from a balcony or high vantage point

entered.detail: clusters of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm flickering illumination throughout the hall
tall gothic arched windows with blue and purple stained glass showing a night sky outside
large stone fireplace with burning fire and mounted torches on the walls beside it
long wooden house tables lined with benches and occupied by numerous dining NPCs
massive stone support columns along the left wall with wall-mounted torches

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in warm candlelight. Floating candle chandeliers hover above long wooden tables where numerous NPCs are seated dining. To the left, a large stone fireplace burns brightly, while the right wall features towering stained glass windows glowing with deep blue night light. The atmosphere is serene and magical, with the crowd quietly eating and conversing below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a magnificent gothic dining hall that remains bathed in a serene, magical glow. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, where floating candle chandeliers hover over long wooden tables filled with dining NPCs. As the camera holds its position, the warm radiance from a large stone fireplace on the left balances the deep blue night light filtering through towering stained glass windows on the right. The scene concludes with a lingering view of the crowd quietly eating and conversing, emphasizing the stillness and grandeur of the medieval atmosphere.
